title: Tryst with the Constitution: The constitutional problems with constitutional morality
description: The Supreme Court is currently hearing arguments in the Sabarimala review matter. The outcome of the judgment, however, will extend beyond the immediate question of the entry of menstruating women into the Sabarimala temple.It raises broader issues, including the ambit of the right to freedom of religion under Article 25, its interplay with the rights of religious denominations under Article 26, the scope of judicial review over religious practices and the meaning of “morality” under Articles 25
